content.en:
"Congratulations to Elder Ye Tian!"

"Congratulations to Elder Ye Tian!"

"Congratulations to Elder Ye Tian!"

A group of elders congratulated.

No matter how Ye Xingchen broke through, now that Ye Tian's son has broken through the myth to the Dao realm, it means that there is one more elder in the human realm, which naturally has to be congratulated.

......

"Ye Tian has a big secret!"

Some of the patriarchs secretly said in private.

They all guessed it, but now that Ye Tian had risen, they had no way to spy on its secrets, but they knew in their hearts that the rise of the human race could not be stopped.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Xingchen officially broke through, and went out, and obtained the authority of the veteran.

And not long after, Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue also met the breakthrough requirements, and Ye Tian also helped her break through.

Immediately afterward, a breakthrough vision emerged.

The eyes of many elders looked at the human domain again, although the vision of this breakthrough was much smaller, and only one ordinary patriarch was born, but most of the innate origin domain alliance were ordinary patriarchs!

Many elders came to inquire again, and when they learned that the person who broke through was Ye Tian's wife, they were immediately shocked.

They were shocked, how rich Elder Ye Tian was, it was unbelievable that he could forcibly help others break through to the Elder level!

"Shouldn't there be people in the human realm who break through to become a mythical Dao realm and become a patriarch?"

Some of the patriarchs said so secretly.

Really.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Xingyue successfully broke through the myth to the Dao realm and became a patriarch.

At this point, the Terrans have four patriarchs.

Moreover, Ye Tian alone is equivalent to many elders.

Moreover, the number of legends of the human race to the Dao realm is also increasing, not only at the level of the patriarch, but also at the level of the Dao realm, and even at the level of the Dao realm, the human race far surpasses the Su clan, the Qin clan, the sword clan and other big clans.

At this time.

Ye Tian was also thinking about the plan to relocate the forces and ethnic groups outside the human race, preparing to build the human domain into a territory that only belonged to the human race, and then transform the human domain into a place that was enough to resist the attack of the patriarchal level.

However, other forces, such as Taisu Palace, also have to give a place to go, after all, there are too many creatures outside the human race, and if there is no place to go, they can't be killed.

If he really did this, it would be no different from exterminating an Innate Origin Domain, and there would definitely be voices of dissatisfaction with him within the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Besides, Ye Tian would definitely not do this, even the original Wuji Heavenly Palace did not do this, how could he do such a thing.

But on this day, a piece of good news came.

"The Innate Origin Domain Alliance has given birth to another Innate Origin Domain!"

......

Somewhere in the void.

An Innate Origin Realm is in the process of being conceived, and some Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms have come here.

Just an Innate Origin Domain, naturally it couldn't attract the attention of the Legendary Dao Realm, let alone the attention of the elders.

However, many small forces are eyeing this Innate Origin Domain and want to occupy an Innate Origin Domain.

However.

Rumble!!!!!

The aura of the patriarch descended, making this group of Nine Folds Dao Realm panic.

In an instant, Ye Tian descended.

This group of Nine Folds Dao Realm recognized Ye Tian, they may not know other elders, but Ye Tian is a new elder, his growth speed is too fast, he used to be a powerhouse in the same realm as them, they naturally recognize it.

"Elder Ye Tian!"

A group of Nine Folds Dao Realm hurriedly shouted.

"This Innate Origin Domain, I want it!"

Ye Tian said in a commanding tone.

"Yes!"

The Nine Folds Dao Realm slipped away, not daring to stay here.

Ye Tian wants this Innate Origin Domain, where do they dare to fight for it!

After another period of time, this Innate Primordial Domain is about to be successfully conceived.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to arrange the formation, building a fortress outside this Innate Origin Domain, protecting this place and connecting it with other Innate Origin Domains.

"It's time to go back and talk to the Taisu Palace Master!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Human domain.

Taisu Palace.

Ye Tian descended here.

"Elder Ye Tian!"

When the Taisu Palace Master saw Ye Tian coming, he said respectfully.

Now she is still only an eightfold to the Dao realm, not even a ninefold to the Dao realm, and Ye Tian is already a high-ranking patriarch, and the status gap is too big.

After Ye Tian came, he didn't beat around the bush, and said directly: "Taisu Palace Master, I hope that Taisu Palace can be relocated to a newly bred Innate Origin Domain, and Taisu Palace will be in charge of that Innate Origin Domain, and I will give a part of the resources as compensation, and I can even give you a Fifth Sequence to Dao Regulation item, how about it?"

"Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Item!"

The Taisu Palace Lord was moved.

Maybe in the Terrans, a fifth-order supreme rule item can be easily exchanged, but she is not a Terran!

The cultivation environment of a new innate origin domain is definitely not as good as the current human domain, but Ye Tian is willing to compensate for resources, and giving some resources casually is enough to make Taisu Palace take off.

At this moment, she had almost guessed Ye Tian's purpose.

She is also the eightfold Dao realm who has gone out of the human realm, and knows that the Su domain, the Qin domain and other innate origin domains, almost all of them are controlled by one clan, and outsiders are not even allowed to enter.

Obviously, Ye Tian also wanted to completely control the human domain, and only allowed the human race to stay in the human domain.

If you don't agree, it will undoubtedly make Ye Tian unhappy.

So, the Taisu Palace Master agreed.

"Elder Ye Tian, I agree!"

The master of Taisu Palace responded.

"Okay, I'll give you this little thing!"

Ye Tian casually threw a void ball to the Taisu Palace Master.

The Taisu Palace Master took it over, and after Ye Tian left, he checked it.

"So many treasures !!!"

The Taisu Palace Lord was excited, these resources were more than ten times more than all the belongings of the Taisu Palace combined, maybe the resources obtained by Ye Tian to kill a legend to the Dao Realm were far more than that.

But for the Taisu Palace Master of the Eightfold Dao Realm, these resources were enough for her and the strength of the Taisu Palace to skyrocket.

Subsequently.

Taisu Palace was ready to evacuate from the human domain, and under the arrangement of the human race, he entered the new innate origin domain, and even the strong people of the human race were willing to help transform the new innate origin domain.

Moreover, the new Innate Origin Domain was renamed the Taisu Domain.

Taisu Palace was originally a top force other than the human race, and its prestige in the Innate Origin Domain was high, and as soon as Taisu Palace left, other forces followed one by one.

Of course, every force that takes the initiative to go, the Terrans will give some benefits.

Gradually, more and more forces are leaving.

Seeing this, those ordinary forces also left.

As for the almost endless small forces, the supreme realm of the human race and the legendary supreme realm took action and moved them out of the human realm and sent them to the Taisu domain, filling the entire Taisu domain.
